message:
Auto-create tabs when none exist to prevent out-of-range errors

When Chrome is running but has no open tabs, commands targeting tab
index 0 would fail with "Tab index 0 out of range (0--1)". This fix
adds auto-tab creation in resolveWsUrl() to match the existing
auto-start Chrome behavior, providing a smoother user experience.

Applies to both the chrome-ws CLI tool and chrome-ws-lib shared library.
